Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) has released Physiotherapist (NSA) Recruitment 2026 Notification.

The RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for candidates who are interested in working in the government sector.
The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of Physiotherapist (NSA) in the government of Rajasthan.
